protocols.Paper_title: Rapid, Sample-to-Answer Host Gene Expression Test to Diagnose Viral Infection
protocols.Evidence: “Stabilized mRNA was released from cleaned and stabilized RNA-surfactant complexes using e-lysis… providing a… PCR-ready sample.” “Integrated centrifugal processing.”

protocols.Paper_title: Rapid, Sample-to-Answer Host Gene Expression Test to Diagnose Viral Infection
protocols.Evidence: “FAST HR process… centrifugally removing qRT-PCR inhibitors… RNase enzymes are inactivated by electrically-induced flash heating… suspension… in a qRT-PCR-ready matrix”
